description: Bill of divorce. Scribed and signed by Yefet b. David b. Shekhanya. Also signed by ʿEli ha-Kohen b. Yaʿish. The husband may be named Ḥal[fon]. There is no note that the geṭ was delivered, unless that note was written on the corner that has been torn away.
description_he: גט. נכתב וחתום בידי יפת בן דוד בן שכניה. חתם גם: עלי הכהן בן יעיש. ייתכן שהחתן הוא חל[פון].
